summary: Phase 1 testing complete. All 22 backend pytest tests PASS (auth with new admin kharwaramog02@gmail.com, old admin removed → 401, /api/auth/me, OTP forgot-password cycle, /api/financial-years returns current+years, /api/students fy filter, /api/dashboard/summary & /by-school fy filter, /api/pending-fees with overdue tracking, POST payments persist next_due_date and surface last_payment_date/next_due_date/overdue_days on GET /api/students/{id}, /api/reports/pdf returns %PDF with both Authorization header and ?token= query, /api/reports/excel returns PK xlsx with same auth modes, status/fy filters on reports work, legacy CSV/HTML reports still work, schools/students/payments CRUD intact, due=today/week filters work, search works). Frontend (Expo web, mobile viewport 390x844) verified: Login screen pre-fills kharwaramog02@gmail.com / 12345678 → tapping Login navigates to Dashboard; Dashboard renders skeleton loaders briefly then KPIs and school-wise summary; 3 FY chips visible and selecting one re-filters the dashboard counts (FY 2025-2026 shows 2 students / ₹32,000 pending; FY 2026-2027 active); bottom nav order is Dashboard / Schools / Students / Pending / Reports with Pending tab positioned between Students and Reports as required; Pending Fees screen renders the overdue student (Amogh, JB School, Class 7, 2d overdue, ₹10,250) with Next Due 27/06/2026 00:00 and Send Reminder WhatsApp button; Reports tab shows both Download PDF and Download Excel buttons that open URLs containing /api/reports/pdf and /api/reports/excel with ?token= for mobile-friendly auth. No red screens, no console errors beyond the expected 401 before login.

ui_bugs.issue: testID of the Excel button is 'report-generate-csv' (legacy name) even though it now downloads .xlsx — confusing but functional

action_items: Optional: rename Excel button testID from 'report-generate-csv' to 'report-generate-excel' in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/reports.tsx for clarity.

Optional: add data-testid passthrough for FY chips on web — the Pressable testID renders but the chip queried by [data-testid^="fy-chip-"] returned 0 (chips visually present and clickable via text); not blocking but would help automated tests.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~880 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth.py, students.py, reports.py, dashboard.py) per the file-size guideline.

/api/pending-fees and dashboard endpoints load all students into memory and call student_to_out per row (extra DB queries per student). Acceptable at current scale but will degrade past a few thousand students — consider an aggregation pipeline.
fy_range() falls back to datetime.min/max on malformed labels and _in_fy returns False on unparseable dates — silent skip. Consider 400 error for clearer feedback when fy param is invalid.
Reports endpoints accept ?token= query param (good for mobile) — token is logged in nginx access logs; acceptable trade-off but worth noting for future hardening.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login prefill, dashboard skeleton, FY chip filter, Pending tab + screen, Reports buttons all working)

seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data left. Test fixtures create TEST_* schools/students and clean up via cascade delete in fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin credentials are kharwaramog02@gmail.com / 12345678 (old admin@busfee.com is intentionally removed on startup). Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Reports support Authorization header AND ?token=<jwt> query string. Mobile viewport 390x844. Expo dev server keeps long-polling open so use wait_until='domcontentloaded' (not 'networkidle') in Playwright. FY chip testIDs do not bubble to web DOM — select chips by text 'FY 2026-2027' etc. Pending tab is at route /pending.
